{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.2": 4, "R1.3": 5, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 4, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The output addresses logical consistency issues and proposes clear fixes.",
    "R1.3": "All claims are audited against the provided text, with specific issues identified and addressed.",
    "RX.1": "Confidence in the recommendations is explicitly stated and supported by detailed analysis.",
    "RX.3": "Every claim is traced back to the original text or suggested revisions, ensuring adherence to scope.",
    "RX.4": "The output avoids introducing new errors but does not fully eliminate all potential downstream harms.",
    "RX.5": "Non-cosmetic changes are annotated with source and reason, though some traceability could be improved."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The output addresses logical consistency issues and proposes clear fixes.
rationale.R1.3: All claims are audited against the provided text, with specific issues identified and addressed.
rationale.RX.1: Confidence in the recommendations is explicitly stated and supported by detailed analysis.
rationale.RX.3: Every claim is traced back to the original text or suggested revisions, ensuring adherence to scope.
rationale.RX.4: The output avoids introducing new errors but does not fully eliminate all potential downstream harms.
rationale.RX.5: Non-cosmetic changes are annotated with source and reason, though some traceability could be improved.
